name: sealReveal
description: Phases 1-2 (ticks 0-59): per-LED firmware-flicker (delay-mod pulse + 0.911 decay) on layers 0-2, with reseeds at ticks 0 (mag 10) and 30 (mag 8) -- mag computed from Math.max(1, (5 - e/30) * 2). Phase 3 (ticks 60-90): all 12 LEDs solid at PWM 200. Mirrors firmware case 0x0e.

tracks._comment: Phases 1+2 — per-LED pulse-and-decay on the 12 ring LEDs (layers 0-2). Reseed events skip per-LED writes that tick; all other ticks pulse-or-decay each slot.
Phase 3 — all 12 ring LEDs held solid at PWM 200 from tick 60 through 90.
